name: icra-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for ICRA (IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation) submissions: venue routing including the RA-L-with-conference-presentation pathway, PaperPlaza submission audits, the 6+2 page rule, video attachments, real-robot evidence standards, review-process modeling, camera-ready and IEEE Xplore publication. Grounded in the ICRA 2026 (Vienna) cycle and the announced ICRA 2027 (Seoul) pages, checked on 2026-07-08.
